manifest.author: Jacob Holm
manifest.description: Smart paste for URLs, images, HTML, YouTube, and Twitter — one plugin, no setup.
manifest.name: Paste Plus

name: Paste Plus

releases.author: jabaho9523
releases.description:
First public release of Paste Plus.

## What is in 1.0.0

- **URL paste** → fetches the page title and inserts a clean `[Title](url)` markdown link
- **Image paste** → saves to your attachments folder with a templated filename and embeds inline
- **HTML paste** → converts rich web content to clean markdown via Turndown
- **YouTube paste** → replaces the URL with the video title
- **Twitter / X paste** → replaces the URL with the post title

Every transform can be toggled in the plugin settings tab.

## Install

Download `main.js`, `manifest.json`, and `styles.css` below and copy them into `<vault>/.obsidian/plugins/paste-plus/`. Then enable the plugin under Settings → Community plugins.
